content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Book is 79% deployed with 10 CNC positions, at the upper limit of the 80% rule with only INR 14K remaining deployable. IT sector is under severe pressure (INFY results post-market today, HCLTECH at 52w low), while FMCG, Pharma, Power, and select Financials are showing strong rotation. India VIX at 18.47 indicates elevated volatility. Priority this cycle is position management (establishing proper SLs and targets on all 10 naked positions) rather than adding new exposure.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24100,
      "nifty_resistance": 24310
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 72.00,
      "new_target": 88.00,
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position down 4.7% but Q4 FY26 results were strong (PAT +35% YoY, GNPA 1.45%, sector-leading CASA 52.5%). Stock hit fresh 52w high on results and is in volume surge today (+3.34%, 2.4x vol). Thesis intact - PSU banking pullback appears to be noise. SL at 72 (below recent swing low 70.31 of 16-Apr, ~7.3% below entry but in line with ATR) to give the thesis room. Target 88 at 1:1.2 R:R given volatility."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 945.00,
      "new_target": 1130.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Up 10.78% today on strong Q4 print (PAT +19%, GNPA below 1% first time). Multiple analyst upgrades (ICICI Sec Rs 1,350, MOFSL Rs 1,200). SL at 945 (just below today's open/prior resistance at 933) to protect gains. Target 1,130 aligns with 52w high area. R:R ~2:1 from current 1004."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 119.50,
      "new_target": 135.00,
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Hedge position against equity volatility. Gold macro drivers intact (Goldman $5,400/oz target). SL at 119.50 (below 20-day SMA and recent lows). Target 135 on move toward 52w high. Keep as portfolio hedge given elevated VIX."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1615.00,
      "new_target": 1820.00,
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Up 3.2% and breaking to new 52w high on volume surge (2.3x). Power sector summer theme strong. SL at 1615 (just below prior day's close and recent breakout level) locks in profit. Target 1820 (analyst 52w range top)."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1355.00,
      "new_target": 1500.00,
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Q4 blowout (PAT +27%, Rev +22.6%, 18% volume growth) but valuation rich at P/E 72-80. SL at 1355 (below today's low 1382 with buffer to ~4% below entry, near prior day close 1286 area would be too loose). Using 1355 as tighter SL given rich valuation and sell-on-news risk. Target 1500 at fresh highs."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 995.00,
      "new_target": 1160.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Strong Q4 business update (deposits +22.8%, advances +25.1%, peer-leading). Board meeting Apr 25-27 with results. Stock breaking out to fresh 52w high. SL at 995 (below today's open 1039 with buffer, near 20d SMA area). Target 1160 (analyst consensus midpoint). R:R ~1.7:1. Binary event next week - good setup."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 655.00,
      "new_target": 740.00,
      "confidence": 0.58,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 8,
      "reasoning": "Volume surge 3.7x, breaking above 685 resistance. Q4 results Apr 29 is binary event. Consensus TP Rs 700-750. SL at 655 (below 9 EMA and recent consolidation). Target 740 (upper analyst TP). FDA compliance overhang keeps conviction moderate."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 2285.00,
      "new_target": 2550.00,
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Defensive FMCG rotation play, up 6.61% today. Q4 results Apr 30 catalyst. SL at 2285 (below 20d SMA 2117 would be too loose; 2285 is near yesterday's close 2231 area with buffer, ~3.7% below entry). Target 2550 (analyst avg TP range)."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 388.00,
      "new_target": 438.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "Breaking to fresh 52w high above 400. Summer demand catalyst, Q4 results May 15. Value entry after 22% 1Y decline. SL at 388 (below Support 1 389 and 9 EMA 386). Target 438 (upper analyst range, gap toward prior highs)."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 198.00,
      "new_target": 240.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 6,
      "reasoning": "Fresh all-time high, +44% April, largest Adani group stock by MCap. Q4 results Apr 29 is binary event with sell-on-news risk given extended run. SL at 198 (below today's low 212 would be too tight; 198 gives ATR buffer, just below recent breakout). Shooting star pattern on 20-Apr warrants caution. Target 240. Tight max hold given event risk."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 72.00,
      "reasoning": "Thesis intact post strong Q4. Give room for pullback to work out."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 945.00,
      "reasoning": "Lock in gains on strong Q4 + analyst upgrade cycle."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 119.50,
      "reasoning": "Portfolio hedge against equity volatility."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1615.00,
      "reasoning": "New 52w high with volume. Trail SL to lock profit."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1355.00,
      "reasoning": "Tight SL on rich-valuation name given sell-on-news risk."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 995.00,
      "reasoning": "Board meeting next week - position well-set for binary event."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 655.00,
      "reasoning": "Volume breakout with Q4 catalyst ahead."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 2285.00,
      "reasoning": "FMCG defensive with Q4 Apr 30 catalyst."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 388.00,
      "reasoning": "Breakout confirmed, lock in above entry."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPOWER",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 198.00,
      "reasoning": "Extended name, tight SL ahead of Apr 29 results given shooting star pattern."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "OFSS (strong Q4 catalyst differentiated from IT weakness), DATAPATTNS (+20% defence breakout but chase territory), AUROPHARMA (buyback floor at 1475 is asymmetric), JIOFINL (Allianz JV catalyst) are all interesting but capital is fully deployed at 79%. Will re-evaluate after any existing positions exit or SLs trigger. INFY post-result reaction tomorrow will set IT sector direction - watching for oversold bounce or continued weakness.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 79% deployed - at cap. No new entries this cycle. Sector concentrations: Power (TORNTPOWER + NTPC + ADANIPOWER) ~19% of capital - at cluster warning level, will NOT add more power names. FMCG (NESTLEIND + HINDUNILVR) ~17% - acceptable defensive allocation. Financials (MAHABANK + PNBHOUSING + AUBANK) ~27% - within sector limit. Key risk: 3 earnings events clustered Apr 27-29 (AUBANK, ADANIPOWER, GRANULES) - binary cluster. Established SLs on all 10 positions address prior gap where positions were running naked. Daily loss buffer INR 75K intact."
}
